title: Radioactive Ores
description: [Radioactive Ores] is a Mod which adds real radioactive ores and items to the game.
body:
# Radioactive Ores
 is a Mod which adds real radioactive ores and items to the game.


By default only Uranium is enabled, but you can enable Thorium as well as Plutonium through the config.

All 3 Ores (and their item variants) have a different radiation amplifier that affects the Player as well as Entities.

The only way to decrease your radiation level is by getting a radiation blocker

Beside the unique Radiation feature this mod doesnt add anything else on its own.


If you experience a significant performance issues with having a lot of entities around you, please report it to me

curseforge: https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/radioactive-ores

modrinth: https://modrinth.com/mod/radioactive-ores

# Q&A
### Q: can i use this mod in my modpack?
 A: ->yes you can!
